title: Salamanca, Castile and León — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Salamanca, Castile and León: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Salamanca is a city in Castile and León with a population of 144,000. A stunning golden-stone university city with one of Europe’s oldest universities and a magnificent Plaza Mayor.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
